title: Function Tool Registration & Invocation
phase_1_registration: Developer → function_tool(func): applies @function_tool decorator (with optional name_override, description_override, failure_error_function, strict_mode, is_enabled, needs_approval, timeout, defer_loading)

function_tool → function_schema(func, name_override, description_override, docstring_style, use_docstring_info, strict_json_schema): parse signature via inspect + docstring via griffe + build pydantic model
function_schema → FuncSchema: returns {name, description, params_pydantic_model, params_json_schema, signature, takes_context}
function_tool: defines async _on_invoke_tool_impl(ctx: ToolContext, input: str) closure referencing FuncSchema

function_tool → _build_wrapped_function_tool(name, description, params_json_schema, invoke_tool_impl=_on_invoke_tool_impl, on_handled_error=..., failure_error_function, strict_json_schema, is_enabled, needs_approval, timeout_seconds, timeout_behavior, defer_loading, sync_invoker)

_build_wrapped_function_tool → FunctionTool(name, description, params_json_schema, on_invoke_tool=_FailureHandlingFunctionToolInvoker, strict_json_schema, is_enabled, needs_approval, timeout_seconds, timeout_behavior, defer_loading)
FunctionTool.__post_init__: if on_invoke_tool has __agents_bind_function_tool__, rebinds invoker to self
phase_2_invocation: Runner/run loop → execute_function_tool_calls(bindings, tool_runs: list[ToolRunFunction], hooks, context_wrapper, config)

execute_function_tool_calls → ToolContext.from_agent_context(context_wrapper, tool_call.call_id, tool_call=raw_tool_call, tool_namespace, agent, run_config): creates ToolContext inheriting RunContextWrapper
invoke_function_tool: checks timeout_seconds; if None → await function_tool.on_invoke_tool(invoke_context, arguments) directly
invoke_function_tool: if timeout set → asyncio.wait_for(on_invoke_tool(...), timeout=timeout_seconds); on TimeoutError raises ToolTimeoutError or returns timeout message
_on_invoke_tool_impl: schema.params_pydantic_model(**json_data) → parsed; raises ModelBehaviorError on ValidationError
_on_invoke_tool_impl → PythonFunction: if async → await the_func(ctx, *args, **kwargs) or await the_func(*args, **kwargs); if sync → asyncio.to_thread(the_func, ...)
phase_3_error_handling: maybe_invoke_function_tool_failure_error_function → failure_error_function(context, error): returns error string for LLM
_FailureHandlingFunctionToolInvoker: if result not None → calls _on_handled_error(function_tool, error, input_json)
_on_handled_error: attach_error_to_current_span(SpanError) + logger.error(...); if result is None → re-raises exception
_build_handled_function_tool_error_handler._on_handled_error: extracts json_decode_error via _extract_tool_argument_json_error; logs with tool_name and error detail

key_classes.FunctionTool: dataclass with name, description, params_json_schema, on_invoke_tool: Callable[[ToolContext, str], Awaitable[Any]], strict_json_schema, is_enabled, needs_approval, timeout_seconds, timeout_behavior, timeout_error_function, defer_loading, _failure_error_function, _use_default_failure_error_function
key_classes.ToolContext: extends RunContextWrapper[TContext]; adds tool_name, tool_call_id, tool_arguments, tool_call: ResponseFunctionToolCall, tool_namespace, agent, run_config; factory: from_agent_context(context, tool_call_id, ...)
key_classes.FuncSchema: dataclass with name, description, params_pydantic_model, params_json_schema, signature, takes_context, strict_json_schema; method to_call_args(BaseModel) -> (args, kwargs)
key_classes._FailureHandlingFunctionToolInvoker: callable wrapping invoke_tool_impl + on_handled_error; supports __agents_bind_function_tool__ for copy rebinding; async __call__(ctx, input)

key_relationships: ToolContext extends RunContextWrapper (composition); created from RunContextWrapper + tool_call metadata
execute_function_tool_calls calls invoke_function_tool which calls FunctionTool.on_invoke_tool
invoke_function_tool handles timeout via asyncio.wait_for + ToolTimeoutError
_on_invoke_tool_impl closure captures FuncSchema + original Python function
important_notes: Two usage forms: @function_tool (no parens) or @function_tool(...) (with config args)
Sync functions are run in asyncio.to_thread; async functions awaited directly
If function first arg is RunContextWrapper/ToolContext, ctx is injected automatically (takes_context=True on FuncSchema)
failure_error_function=None → exceptions re-raised to caller; default → LLM gets friendly error string
timeout only supported for async @function_tool handlers; timeout_behavior='error_as_result' (default) or 'raise_exception'
defer_loading=True hides tool from LLM until ToolSearchTool loads it (Responses API only)
FunctionTool.__post_init__ rebinds on_invoke_tool if it exposes __agents_bind_function_tool__ (copy-awareness pattern)
_build_handled_function_tool_error_handler returns closure that attaches SpanError to tracing + logs; different messages for JSON decode vs runtime errors
ToolContext.from_agent_context propagates context fields from RunContextWrapper and inherits agent_tool_state_scope
